message.content:
You need to be logged in to run Python code in this ChatGPT environment. You can, however, run the following Python snippet on your local machine or any Python environment to find your external IPv4 address:

Python
Run
import requests

try:
    response = requests.get("https://api.ipify.org?format=json", timeout=5)
    response.raise_for_status()
    ip_data = response.json()
    print("Your external IPv4 address is:", ip_data.get("ip"))
except requests.RequestException as e:
    print("Error fetching IP address:", e)

This will print your public IP directly.
